title: Holy Light returns a cemetery card to hand

card.rawText: Return any card from your cemetery to your hand. This card cannot be returned from the cemetery.

plan.title: Holy Light returns a cemetery card to hand
plan.summary: Play Holy Light with a card in player_1 cemetery and verify that card moves to hand.

notes: Place one player_1 card in cemetery before play.

steps: Choose a card from player_1 cemetery.

expectedAssertions.label: Returned card no longer in cemetery

manualVerification: Confirm Holy Light itself cannot be selected from cemetery by this effect.
riskNotes: This fixture covers a normal card return, not the self-exclusion static rule.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate cemetery-to-hand movement for any card.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
